title: Schism of Mars
epithet: The Betrayal of the Red Planet
specialty: Mechanicum civil war · Dark Mechanicum origin · Chaos corruption of Mars
lore: The Schism of Mars was the catastrophic civil war that tore the Mechanicum apart during the opening phase of the Horus Heresy. When Fabricator-General Kelbor-Hal allied with Horus and opened the forbidden vaults beneath Mars, he unleashed Chaos-tainted constructs that rampaged across the Red Planet.

Loyalist and Traitor Mechanicum forces fought bitterly across the forge complexes, hab-warrens, and underground galleries of Mars. Ancient war machines, Titans, and legions of Skitarii clashed in combat that scarred the planet's surface and destroyed irreplaceable facilities and knowledge.

The Schism ended with the Traitor Mechanicum — now called the Dark Mechanicum — fleeing Mars with the retreating Traitor Legions. The survivors of the Loyalist Mechanicum were reorganised by the victorious Imperium into the Adeptus Mechanicus — bound more tightly to Imperial authority and stripped of some of their former autonomy.
